2026 Endorsements
The following are the Sierra Club's endorsements for the June 2nd, 2026, Statewide Direct Primary Election and November 3rd, 2026 Midterm Election.
The last day to register to vote in the primary is 15 days earlier, May 18th, 2026.
The last day to register for the midterm is 15 days earlier, October 19th, 2026.
This page will be updated as endorsements are finalized. Read about our endorsement process here .
Federal Candidates
US Representative, District 2: Jared Huffman
US Representative, District 10: Mark DeSaulnier
US Representative: District 11: Scott Wiener
US Representative: District 12: Lateefah Simon
State Candidates
State Senate, District 2: Damon Connolly
State Assembly, District 17: Matt Haney
State Assembly, District 19: Catherine Stefani
Insurance Commissioner: Ben Allen
Attorney General: Rob Bonta
Controller: Malia Cohen
Secretary of State: Shirley Webber
Regional Ballot Measures
Marin / Sonoma
SMART Rail Transit Tax Extension: YES!
Alameda / Contra Costa / San Francisco / San Mateo / Santa Clara
Connect Bay Area : YES! (on the Midterm ballot in the fall)
County Candidates
Alameda
Board of Supervisors: Lena Tam
City Ballot Measures
San Francisco
Measure A, Earthquake Safety and Emergency Response Bond : YES!
City Candidates
San Francisco
Board of Supervisors District 2: Stephen Sherrill
Berkeley
City Council District 4: Igor Tregub
City Council District 6: Kevin Jenkins
City Council District 8: Mark Humbert
El Cerrito
City Council: Gabe Quinto
City Council: Carolyn Wysinger
Richmond
City Council: Doria Robinson
City Council: Cesar Zepeda
San Francisco
Stronger MUNI for All : Yes! (on the Midterm ballot in the fall)
Special District Candidates
AC Transit Ward 4: Sarah Syed
Pages with political endorsements have a simplified web design. Please click the back button to return to the previous screen or “Home” to go to this website’s home page. Sierra Club National Endorsements
